history.subject: RR.1: refresh principal / ordFrac-naturality docstrings now that finite-support is proved (no stale 'left as a sorry' notes)

Serre lane: Γ(Proj ℤ[X], O(m)) ≅ (ℤ[X])_m as formSectionEquiv — prove surjectivity of the degree-m-form section map by graded separation. overlapRingHom is injective (overlapHom is an isomorphism onto D₊(XᵢXⱼ), so the abstract descent condition descends to an away-fraction identity); a compatible family (aᵢ ∈ Away Xᵢ) with awayMap_Xⱼ aᵢ = awayMap_Xᵢ aⱼ·(Xⱼ/Xᵢ)^m comes from a single degree-m form F via a no-poles divisibility Xᵢ₀^{k₀} ∣ Xᵢ₀^m·N₀ (primality of Xᵢ₀ against a second variable, or the subsingleton structure) plus domain cross-multiplication. Package formSectionEquiv := AddEquiv.ofBijective; derive Γ(O(0)) ≅ ℤ and identify the coordinate sections formSectionEquiv 1 (Xⱼ) = x_j.

Div base change: land section surjectivity (H¹(V,ker q)=0) for epi of qcoh over affine, pushout tensor rebase, and per-piece injectivity of g'^*(ker q ↪ E); reduces pullback_kernel_isLocallyTrivial mono to basis globalization

Picard/schematic support: descended module on V(Ann F) is finitely presented over a Noetherian base and faithful — affine heart of step (3) of the support-descent brick F ≅ i_* N (finrank of the fibre reduces to Γ of a proper closed subscheme)
N5: concrete Pi.π-component formulas for the unnormalized Cech differential
N5: coface differential in genuine restriction-map form
O(m) on Proj and ℙ(n;S) is a locally trivial line bundle, hence finitely presented and quasi-coherent (P0.4)
H0 flat base change of O(m) sections over a flat affine base (P0.2κ core)
Close the divisor base-change sorry: g'^*(ker q ↪ E) stays monic under flat base change.
Expose the base-change comparison isomorphism g'^*(ker q) ≅ ker(g'^* q) — the Abel-map feeder.
